mapper.select:
SELECT pt.id, pt.name, pt.project_id, pp.name AS project_name, pt.user_id, su.name AS user_name, pt.company_id, rc.name AS company_name, pt.date_deadline, pt.stage_id, pt.description, pt.sequence FROM project_task pt LEFT JOIN project_project pp ON pt.project_id = pp.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON pt.user_id = su.id LEFT JOIN res_company rc ON pt.company_id = rc.id
AND (pt.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND pp.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.projectName}, '%')
AND su.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userName}, '%')
AND rc.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.companyName}, '%')
ORDER BY pt.id DESC
